title: Korfaise
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Substance |image=[[File:Korfaise_gas.png]] |name=Korfaise |locations= |date= |discovered= |creators= |created= |type=[[Gas/Legends|Gas]]''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' |color=[[Color/Legends|White]] |properties=*Lighter than air *Dangerous to breathe |uses=[[Starship/Legends|Starship]] [[Coolant/Legends|coolant]] |cost= }} {{Quote|You like it?''"
"''That probably depends on whether the ship's about to blow up. What did you ''do''?''"
"''Cut through the coolant lines to the main drive. That's all their pressurized korfaise gas floating away.|Han Solo and Leia Organa Solo|}} '''Korfaise''' was a [[Gas/Legends|gas]] used as a [[Coolant/Legends|coolant]] for [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. The gas was white and dangerous to breathe but easy to avoid outside contained areas, as it was lighter than air. [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300s]] were known to use korfaise gas as the coolant for their main drive. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] was able to sabotage a ship masquerading as the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] by using [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia's]] newly constructed [[Leia's lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to cut the coolant lines and release the korfaise gas into the ship, incapacitating several [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] onboard. ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesAED}} *''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *[[Heir to the Empire 2|''Heir to the Empire'' 2]] ==Sources== *''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Galaxy at War]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Gases]]
